description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules directory. Add a before_script that globally installs the codecov package with yarn and runs yarn to install project dependencies. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in this stage. The test job executes the command 'yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN' and has no artifacts or special rules, running on every pipeline.
